name: Asian Beef and Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium nonstick skillet, brown the ground turkey. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
2. Pour off any excess drippings from the skillet.
3. Season the turkey with half of the seasoning packet from the noodles. Set aside.
4. In the same skillet, add 1 cup water, the frozen mixed vegetables, broken up noodles, ground ginger, and the remaining seasoning packet.
5. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat.
6. Cover and simmer for 3 minutes or until the noodles are tender, stirring occasionally.
7. Return the turkey to the skillet. Stir in the sliced green onion.
